incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on first attempt

steps.text: Look at the height of each bar. Which one is the shortest?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Fewest means the smallest number. Maya's bar is the shortest—she read 4 books.

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: Maya's bar pulses and is highlighted as the shortest bar on the graph

steps.text: This is tricky, so let me show you. Fewest means the smallest number. Look at all the bars: James is tallest at 7, then Aiden at 6, Sofia at 5, and Maya is shortest at 4. The shortest bar shows the fewest books—that's Maya.
